---
name: Data / removal request
---

## Removal and data requests are handled privately — not here.

Please use the form at **[echovault.gg/removal](https://echovault.gg/removal)** to submit your request. That form keeps your details private; a public GitHub issue does not.

**Do not post your character name, world, lodestone ID, or any other identifying information in a public issue.** GitHub issues are visible to everyone.

Every request submitted through the site is reviewed by a human. Removal and profile changes take effect within minutes of approval.

---

*If you are reporting a bug rather than a data request, please use the [Bug report](?template=bug_report.md) template instead.*
